title: Trip
lyrics: I'm thinking, I'll make you mine, yeah Hey girl, don't trip, I'm thinking, I'll make you mine, yeah Hey girl, don't trip, I'm walking through the night I see a light above and all above the tunnels in my mind But I'm thinking, can I clutch you in? Or was it another false hallucination of me and my dreams, am I just wasting time? I see that look in your eyes, you're hypnotizing my mind Hey girl, don't trip, but, that look up in your eyes got my mind drifting Got me thinking of the ways we can come together, how we can all be hooked I'm growing, I'm like 24-7 and you know that you're there Wanna text you all day, wanna know when you're near You're like my only light, give me a minute my dear I understand that life goes so much ways and that ways and up downs and that But I can see the true heart in you, I've seen it through it from the start No judgement from you, it's kinda new, me and this, new reality and attitude Hey girl, that look up in your eyes, you got me hypnotized I'm thinking that I'll make you mine, don't trip That look up in your eyes, you got me hypnotized Said, maybe I'll, maybe I'll make you mine, don't trip Don't think it's more, than the love you get Don't think it's more, than the love you send Don't think it's more, than the love that you give You get back in return, I swear You got me hypnotized I'll make you mine, I'll make you mine Don't trip That look up in your eyes, you got me hypnotized I swear I'm gonna make you mine Don't trip Don't want that jealousy, don't want that ingrained Attitude of you and me was kinda hard not to behave I want you always near You got that shit that makes me love Every second I'm with you Oh girl, that look up in your eyes, you got me hypnotized Now that I think you're mine, don't trip That look up in your eyes, you got me hypnotized Now when I think you're mine, don't trip Don't trip, don't trip, don't trip, don't trip In a zip, in a zip, in a zip, in a whip Don't trip, don't trip, don't trip Girl, girl, girl, don't trip Girl, girl, girl, don't trip Girl I'm waiting for the next moment, don't blip I like to hit
